decisions.title: Ship CSRS (Columnar Storage Read Service) to production
decisions.context: Multiple signals show CSRS work progressing: record-level deduplication (ENG-10157), SchemalessV1 reads (ENG-9987), query forwarding (ENG-10160), integration tests (ENG-9989). This is critical infrastructure for 'Nail the Core' - faster queries enable better decision capture.

arguments.for: Performance improvements unlock faster exploration, directly supporting North Star metric. Multiple integration points ready.
arguments.against: Risk of regression on existing queries. Need comprehensive load testing and rollback plan.

decisions.title: Promote Explore V2 (E2) to default experience
decisions.context: Signals show E2 maturing: family creation improvements (ENG-10177, ENG-9537), permission handling (ENG-10106, ENG-10105), feature flag audit for GA (ENG-9779). E2 is core to 'Embed Deeper' - better UX captures more decisions.
decisions.blockedBy: Feature flag audit (ENG-9779) incomplete, permission edge cases unresolved

arguments.for: Users need the improved family workflow now. Delaying reduces decision capture rate.
arguments.against: Permission bugs (ENG-10106, ENG-10105) could block critical workflows. Need 100% confidence before default switch.

decisions.title: Invest in React 19 upgrade vs. feature velocity
decisions.context: ENG-6257 proposes React 19.2 upgrade with Compiler. This is technical debt vs. feature work tradeoff. Current velocity shows 30 tickets, mostly features.

arguments.for: React Compiler could improve performance long-term, supporting faster UI = more decisions captured. Modern stack attracts talent.
arguments.against: 2-3 week distraction from Canvas, Python Rules, Ask SIFT roadmap. Unclear ROI on decision capture metric.

decisions.title: Address Python Rules reliability issues immediately
decisions.context: Ghost events (ENG-9978) and report graph bugs (ENG-9979) indicate Python Rules core reliability problems. Python Rules is a 2026 pillar product under 'Build the Moat'.

arguments.for: Customers can't trust decisions from unreliable rules. Direct impact on North Star - broken rules = zero decisions captured.
arguments.against: Edge cases may not affect majority of users. Resource allocation away from new Python Rules features.

decisions.title: Accelerate Files in CEL beta launch
decisions.context: ENG-10170 shows pre-beta fixes in progress. Files in CEL enables new decision workflows (Canvas integration). Aligns with 'Embed Deeper' - CEL as decision language.

arguments.for: Unlocks new customer workflows for document analysis decisions. Differentiator for 'Build the Moat'.
arguments.against: Beta scope unclear. Risk of spreading thin across too many initiatives (CSRS, E2, React, Files).

timeAudit.weekSummary: High meeting density week - 3 sprint planning, 4 architecture reviews (CSRS, Reactor backend), 8 1:1s, 2 customer escalations (CSV export, rule ghost events), 5 standup blocks
alerts: Only 8 free hours this week - below 20% threshold for maker time
Back-to-back meetings Mon-Wed afternoons blocking deep work
Customer escalation meetings increasing - need to resolve ENG-10022 and ENG-9978 to reduce reactive time
